svg.title: DFW Operating System Hardening Preview Visual Mockup Artifact v1.0.0
svg.desc: Governed visual mockup board for the DFW Matchday Concierge World Cup Matchday Operating System. This artifact is for review only and does not authorize frontend implementation.
svg.text: DFW Operating System Hardening Preview Visual Mockup Artifact v1.0.0
Review artifact only. Docs-contained SVG. No frontend implementation. No DreamHost production authorization.

Global rule: DFW Matchday Concierge is an independent concierge planning and coordination service. Final availability, pricing, payment terms, vehicle assignment, third-party provider routing, and service confirmation require operator review.
DFW World Cup Matchday Operating System
Welcome to Dallas/Fort Worth for matchday.
Choose your lane and build the command hub for your route, team, schedule, food, luggage, group, and concierge needs.
Mobile acceptance: inquiry within three taps.
Choose the matchday lane that best fits your trip.
Black 2026 Chevrolet Tahoe eligibility for approved bookings.
Tahoe and operator assignment are never guaranteed before confirmation.
Privacy-sensitive family, team-adjacent, or federation-linked planning.
No official team relationship or credential validation is claimed.
Crews, sponsors, executives, groups, equipment, and catering.
Fleet, provider, invoice, and assignment availability require review.
Team, language, route, Fan Experience, food, shared ride.
Shared ride matching is not automatic or guaranteed.
Arrival, departure, airport, hotel area, matchday interest
No exact sensitive details before secure access.
Planning preview only. Operator review required for confirmation.
Arrival Plan | Matchday Movement | Food + Cooler | Luggage | Route Map | Quote Status
Preview is not a confirmed booking.
Boundary: Activated planning does not equal confirmed service. Requested items must remain visually unconfirmed until operator approval and payment terms are complete.
Subject to confirmation. Capacity reviewed by luggage and comfort.
No ads. No guaranteed Tahoe. No official access claim.
Hub owner separate from principal client.
No ads. No forced public disclosure. No team authorization claim.
No ads. No fleet or invoice guarantee.
Boundary: Free guidance supports planning. Fulfillment and shared ride matching are confirmed separately.
Boundary: Map visuals support planning orientation. Live routing, live traffic, and dispatch require verified implementation.
Rule: No service, route, hub, payment state, or referral zone appears without a visible or mapped status.
Blocked: VIP hub, Team Family hub, private Media / Corporate hub, privacy-sensitive activated hub.
Disclosure labels: Direct DFW Service | Operator-Assisted | Third-Party Referral | Affiliate / Referral Link | Information Only
Passes only after visual mockup review validates claim control, mobile hierarchy, QR destination, map/source accuracy, asset rules, and monetization zones.
